description_long: This house features a steeply pitched red-tiled gable roof with visible wooden beams framing the cream-colored walls. The structure sits on a stone foundation, and a prominent stone chimney rises along one side, adding a rustic touch. The front facade includes a wooden door with two horizontal planks and a small set of stone steps leading up to it. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows with wooden frames and diamond-patterned glass panes, and a small dormer window projects from the roof. The exterior materials and stylized textures evoke a quaint, storybook or medieval European cottage. The overall design is compact, with a single main story and a cozy, inviting appearance.
description: A compact, storybook-style house with a red-tiled gable roof, stone chimney, and symmetrical wooden-framed windows on cream walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door with two planks, stone steps, and the stone chimney on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two large windows, a dormer window on the roof, and the full length of the red-tiled roof.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the plain back wall, the stone chimney in full, and the roof's wooden framing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows, the stone chimney on the left, and the uninterrupted red-tiled roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with horizontal planks, stone steps, no porch or overhang, simple rustic style
